text:
I gave a talk at Laravel Live Japan @LaravelLiveJP 🇯🇵

A tech glitch right before I started turned me pale… and somehow it became the most fun I've had on a stage in years. What a day!

I wrote it all up here:
https://t.co/vN43lvShrZ

#LaravelLiveJP #inspired
